module.name: import-path-helpers
module.description: Helper functions for evaluating import path characteristics used by path-based rules.

scenarios.name: should return the file name from a Unix path
should return the file name from a Windows path
scenarios.given: a Windows-style absolute path with backslash separators

scenarios.name: should return the path unchanged when no separator is present
scenarios.given: a bare file name with no directory separators

scenarios.name: should return an empty string for an empty path
should return true for index.ts
scenarios.given: a file path whose name is 'index.ts'

scenarios.name: should return true for single-extension index files
scenarios.given: a file path whose name is 'index.js' or 'index.mts'

scenarios.name: should return false for a double-extension index file
scenarios.given: a file path whose name is 'index.test.ts' or 'index.d.ts'

scenarios.name: should return false for a non-index file
scenarios.given: a file path whose name is not 'index.*'

scenarios.name: should return true for the exact '..' path
should return true for paths beginning with '../'
should return false for a relative same-directory path
should return false for an absolute or node_modules path
